title: Correction to: Early-life exposure to PM2.5 and risk of acute asthma clinical encounters among children in Massachusetts: a case-crossover analysis.

summary: Case-crossover analysis investigating the association between early-life PM2.5 exposure and acute asthma clinical encounters among children in Massachusetts.
